sections.paragraph:
Original: יכיליה יכליהוּ יכליה o

Transliteration: yekolyâh yekolyâhû yekı̂yleyâh

Phonetic: yek-ol-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Jecoliah or Jecholiah = "Jehovah is able"
  1. wife of king Amaziah of Judah and mother of king Uzziah (Azariah)

Origin: from H3201 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
